title: Omni Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Omni Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Omni Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Omni Logistics India:
Omni Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omni Logistics India!
